articles.title: Cozzilla: The Psychedelic Godzilla Fever Dream Finally Hits Blu-ray
articles.summary: Before IMAX shook seats, Cozzilla tried to rattle your brain. This bizarre 1977 Italian re-edit of the original Godzilla splices in WWII footage, blasts a synth-heavy score, and drowns scenes in hallucinatory colors. Long a bootleg legend, it's now getting an official Blu-ray release on May 17.

articles.title: Sega Unearths Early Sonic Adventure Concept Art with a Ghibli-esque Vibe
articles.summary: Newly revealed concept art for Sonic Adventure shows a drastically different vision: a squat Sonic in pastoral fields, soot sprites under rocks, and Amy exploring a eerie castle. Sega shared the images with little context, but they hint at a Saturn-era prototype before the Dreamcast's attitude-driven redesign took over.

articles.title: Raducanu Reconnects with US Open-Winning Coach Ahead of Rome Return
articles.summary: Emma Raducanu, the 2021 US Open champion, has trained with Andrew Richardson—the coach who guided her to that historic win—at Spain's Ferrer Academy. It's a short-term arrangement as she prepares for the Italian Open after illness, but it revives a pivotal partnership from her breakthrough moment.
